rulings.Case Title: VERONIKA LANE et al VS. MATRIXX INITIATIVES, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, December 9, 2009, line 7, DEFENDANTS MATRIXX INITIATIVES, INC., ZICAM, LLC, ROBERT S. DAVIDSON, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Demurrer sustained with ten days leave to amend. Plaintiff must allege which product(s) plaintiffs were exposed to and how and where they were injured by the product(s). Plaintiffs shall file their affidavit pursuant to Civil Code section 1780(d) with their first amended complaint. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: WAI MAN CHAN VS. CALIFORNIA UNEMPLOYMENT INSURANCE APPEALS BOARD
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Writ Of Mandate To Review Decision Of Unemployment Insuarance Appeals Board
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, December 9, 2009, line 9, PETITIONER WAI CHAN Petition For Writ Of Mandate To Review Decision Of Unemployment Insuarance Appeals Board. Petition denied. Petitioner fails to maintain her burden of proof. Petitioner does not show that respondent abused its discretion. =(302/CWW)
